events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: staged work, wrong wirenut size observed. NEC 110.14 requires proper termination connectors rated for the conductor material and size. Wrong wirenut size means non-compliant. Since work hasn't begun but materials staged are wrong, decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk medium. Component condition: non-compliant. Percent complete 0.
